title: ADDICTION COUNSELING - 211info
text: INNER JOURNEY SCAPPOOSE ADDICTION COUNSELING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient substance abuse counseling using Person-centered modalities and practices. Services may include creating a treatment service plan, a focus on behavior patterns, Individual relapse prevention, and peer support. 51579 COLUMBIA RIVER highway Suite G Scappoose, OR 97056 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 543-6100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 543-6100 Intake (971) 777-0756 Assessment Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies. Accepts OHP and offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: By appointment only Wednesday noon-5pm Services: Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DUII MODULE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. INNER JOURNEY SCAPPOOSE
